visual_description: A man in a suit rides a bicycle with a basket of fruit, positioned in the foreground on a paved road. Behind him, a group of cyclists in colorful jerseys and helmets pedals in a line, maintaining close proximity. The scene is set outdoors under a clear blue sky, with trees and open fields visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a medium pitch and moderate pace, delivering a message with a neutral tone.
